notableEvents.label: Josh Jung plunked
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung hit by pitch. Corey Seager to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop Max Schuemann to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Corey Seager out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.
